summary: Bug-fix verification for Projects rotating 3D cylinder. Both reported issues resolved: (1) side cards are clickable (pointerEvents='auto' whenever front>-0.5) and open the correct detail modal; (2) inline stage box and fullscreen wrapper have overflow:visible so cards are no longer clipped at container edges. Fullscreen toggle, body scroll lock, drag/hover, images, and responsive layout (1440/1280/390) all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Mobile (390px): side cards can render slightly outside the container box (e.g., card left = -3px, -11px) because the surrounding section still uses overflow-hidden which visually clips them at the viewport edge. Not the reported bug (they don't look 'half cut' at the gallery box edges — they overflow the section). Consider slightly increasing radius reduction on <640px if further polish is desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Projects cylinder bug fixes verified end-to-end. Side card at idx=1 (right side, centerX~976 vs stageCx~720) opened modal with correct link (sunflower project on mobile, mango on desktop). Stage + fullscreen wrapper have overflow:visible; container/stage widths fit within viewport (1440 sw=cw=1440, 1280 sw=cw=1280, 390 sw=cw=390). Fullscreen sets body.overflow=hidden and clears on close. No dev overlay errors.
